rulings.Case Title: LOUISE DOUGLAS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs Sought By Respondent City And County Of San Francisco
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 10, 2016, Line 1. PETITIONER LOUISE DOUGLAS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs Sought By Respondent City And County Of San Francisco is GRANTED. Attorney's fees in the amount of $1,170 were imposed as a sanction against Mr. Driscoll only. These attorney's fees are not costs recoverable from the Petitioners. Mr. Driscoll is ordered to comply with May 9, 2016 order and pay $1,170 to the Respondent no later than November 23, 2016 (if the payment has not yet been made). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM DAWSON VS. PETER ISKANDAR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16 Special Motion To Strike (Anti-Slapp) Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 10, 2016, Line 9. DEFENDANT PETER ISKANDAR, LEE B. DO LLC. Motion And Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16 Special Motion To Strike (Anti-Slapp) Complaint is DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. Pursuant to Baral v. Schnitt (August 1, 2016) 1 Cal.5th 376 each claim (regardless of its inclusion into one cause of action with other claims) is to be evaluated under the first prong of CCP 425.16. Moving party failed to sustain its burden re: IIED and UCL to based on the claims listed under a-c; Breach of Quiet Enjoyment; SFRO 37.10B; negligence based on invasion of privacy and IIED. Therefore, Motion to Strike as to these claims is DENIED. Moving party sustained its burden under the first prong as claims for wrongful use of first administrative proceeding; wrongful use of second administrative proceeding; IIED and UCL to based on the claims listed under d-e; and Negligence based on wrongful use of administrative proceedings and elder abuse. Opposing party failed to show probability of prevailing on these claims with competent admissible evidence supporting each element of each of these claims. As to the cause of action to attorney's fees, the CCP 425.16 motion is denied. Irrespective of the label "Eights cause of action" this is merely a prayer not a cause of action or a claim, subject to CCP 425.16. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP VS. JESSE MARTIN JR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 10, 2016, Line 10. DEFENDANT JESSE MARTIN Notice Of Motion And Motion For Costs is OFF CALENDAR. The proper procedure to claim costs is to file a Memorandum of Costs, which was done on October 3, 2016. Plaintiff failed to file a timely Motion to Strike or Tax costs by October 24, 2016 (CRC 3.1700). Memorandum of Costs matured on October 24, 2016. =(501/REQ)
